chinese_news.summary:
大公司：

圆通速递：4月快递产品收入60.71亿元，同比增长5.49%
36氪获悉，圆通速递公告，4月快递产品收入60.71亿元，同比增长5.49%；业务完成量27.26亿票，同比增长1.22%；快递产品单票收入2.23元，同比增长4.21%。

哔哩哔哩：一季度营收74.7亿元，日均活跃用户1.15亿

36氪获悉，哔哩哔哩（以下简称“B站”）公布了截至2026年3月31日第一季度财务报告。 财报显示，B站一季度总营收为74.7亿元人民币。日均活跃用户为1.15亿，同比增长8%；日均使用时长提升至119分钟，创历史新高。毛利率连续15个季度环比提升至37.1%，调整后净利润5.9亿元，同比增长62%。

金浦钛业：公司目前没有电池投资计划

金浦钛业5月19日在业绩说明会上表示，2026年新能源公司能否实现盈利受多种因素影响，具有不确定性。此外，公司目前没有电池投资计划。（证券时报）

chinese_news.title: 裸辞九个月，降薪跳槽，一个80后营销人如何“上岸甲方”？｜百万年薪系列013
chinese_news.summary:
图源：公众号「有三思 U Sense」）

2023年秋，杭州亚运会湖州赛区。于成龙手持亚运火炬跑过城市街巷，掌心传来的温度让他想起十四年前，那个没有暖气的冬天。

彼时他在河南安阳的一间出租屋里，裹着羽绒服改方案，手指冻得握不住笔。他在那个冬天起跑，完成了一场长达18年的迁徙：从连“VI”是什么意思都要查百度的广告新人，到亚奥理事会特聘专家；从地产广告公司年薪两万的驻场专员，到网络安全企业百万年薪的市场高管；从乙方执行到甲方操盘；从职业经理人再到国际赛事组委会成员……

chinese_news.title: 影石：重新定义性价比
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 张帆

坚持做后来者

近日，影石创新发布了登陆资本市场后的首份年报。2025年，公司实现营业收入97.41亿元，同比大幅增长74.76%，创下成立以来的最高营收纪录。然而，同期由于研发、销售等费用高企，公司归母净利润仅为9.29亿元，同比下降了6.62%。

面对这样一份“营收大增、利润下滑”的财报，公司召开了上市后的首次投资者交流会，以回应资本市场的关切。

根据2025年年报显示，报告期内，公司影像业务营收增长了78%，主要得益于销量的大幅提升——2025年实现销量393万台，同比增长76%。另一方面，产品均价相对平稳，约为2169元，同比增长1%。

从ASP趋势来看，公司产品整体呈现下降态势，从2022年的2,391.45元/台连续两年下滑至2024年的2147元，但在2025年实现了企稳。在当前激烈的市场竞争环境下，价格企稳的主要原因，是受益于公司积极拓展B端等高单价客户的提振。

尽管有争议，但不可否认的是，即便面临激烈的价

chinese_news.title: 鲸跃动力获星海图数千万元种子轮投资，用「数据+模型+末端执行」打造开箱即用的Robo Labor丨涌现新项目
chinese_news.summary:
文｜王欣逸

编辑｜邱晓芬

一句话介绍

鲸跃动力成立于2026年，以「数据+模型+末端执行」闭环，提供面向场景、可快速部署的Robo Labor（机器人劳动力），让物理劳动力像AWS算力一样，可订阅、可弹性扩容、开箱即用，替代人类从事高危、繁重、脏乱、重复（Deadly/Difficult/Dirty/Duplicate）的物理作业。

融资进展

近日，鲸跃动力已完成由星海图独家领投的数千万元种子轮融资，深渡资本担任独家财务顾问。

本轮融资将用于团队增长、产品的量产交付、专家技能的研发以及数采运营相关工作。

星海图表示：“具身智能的下半场，拼的是‘数据效率×模型泛化×末端执行’的系统能力。鲸跃动力锚定数据主线，专注在真实场景实现快速交付迭代，与我们追求物理世界数据闭环的理念高度一致。团队兼具数据、模型与交付的稀缺基因，

chinese_news.title: 高瓴出手了一家AI体育科技公司，曾获李泽湘天使轮融资｜硬氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
作者｜黄楠

编辑｜袁斯来

硬氪获悉，AI体育科技公司SportVision近日已完成天使+轮融资，高瓴创投（GL Ventures）领投，谦恒资本担任独家财务顾问。本轮资金将重点用于核心技术研发、产品量产落地及市场的拓展推广。其新款AI网球训练相机产品计划发售中。

SportVision隶属于深圳思博威视体育科技有限公司‌，长期专注运动算法研发与硬件产品应用、构建AI智能教练体系，此前已获得李泽湘教授旗下清水湾基金的天使轮投资。

过去几年，运动科技赛道几乎被硬件厂商重新定义了一遍。发球机让“一个人练球”成为可能，运动相机令“训练过程的记录”不再需要专人跟拍，智能手表/手环把心率、步频、消耗卡路里等量化成精确的长期数据记录。

尽管每一类产品都跑出了规模不小的公司，但它们各自停留在陪练、记录、监测的单点功能上——数据相互独立、能力无法贯通，难以为用户提供连贯、整体的个性化支持。

运动人群的深层渴望远不止于被记录，还有被指导、被陪伴、被看见进步。一场更底层的变革正在发生：从“记录

索辰科技：物理AI业务目前尚处于布局初期

36氪获悉，索辰科技公告，公司股票于2026年5月14日至5月18日连续三个交易日内收盘价格涨幅偏离值累计达到30%，属于股票交易异常波动情形。公司近期实施的募投项目“物理合成数据核心技术基座构建与多领域场景示范应用项目”尚处于筹备阶段，若出现募集资金投资项目未能顺利实施、新技术开发进度不达预期、研发遭遇技术瓶颈甚至失败，将会对公司经营业绩造成一定影响。公司物理AI业务目前尚处于布局初期。物理AI技术研发投入大、技术迭代快，存在研发进度不及预期、核心技术迭代风险；同时下游行业应用场景拓展、商业化变现存在不确定性，若市场需求、行业政策、技术竞争格局发生不利变化，物理AI业务收入及盈利贡献存在不及预期风险。

chinese_news.title: 番茄小说正推动 AI 动漫上院线，开放头部IP改编权限｜36氪独家
chinese_news.summary:
作者｜兰杰 李晓霞

编辑｜乔芊

36氪独家获悉，据多位接近字节跳动人士消息，字节旗下的番茄小说正在推动AI动漫上院线。在这一过程中，会开放番茄小说平台头部IP的改编权限。

之于番茄小说，如何更好地挖掘平台上好IP的潜力和商业价值，是一个亟待解决的难题。

一方面，以文字形式为载体的IP内容，缺乏统一的视觉形象，使得平台上的IP难以有联名、衍生品等更丰富的变现形式。另一方面，AI漫剧这一新事物迅速发展壮大，其中不乏改编自番茄小说IP的粗制滥造之作。这些内容不但没能延长好IP的生命力，反而形成了一种消耗。此时，通过可登陆院线的影视内容来探索平台IP的更多可能性，不失为一种好的尝试。

另据上述知情人士表示，字节跳动内部为番茄IP定下了影响力的目标，“想让行业内外的人觉得番茄的出品是精品的、正向的。”这一需求落到具体的业务上，上院线会是个不错的答卷。

早在2023年年底，番茄小说就官宣成立了“番茄影视”和“番茄动漫”两大厂牌，推动平台IP的影视化。过去两年间，番茄影视先后与腾讯视频、

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Bitcoin close above $80,000 on or before December 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: 30-year Treasury yields at 5.19% (crisis-high) create macro headwinds; BTC currently sub-$77K despite institutional inflows—bond yields are the critical marginal price driver.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (Treasury yield 5.19%); Cointelegraph (BTC under $77K, US bond yields near 20-year highs)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will OpenAI achieve a valuation ≥$200B in any secondary market transaction by June 30, 2027?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Polymarket just launched private company trading for OpenAI/Anthropic valuations; Google's aggressive AI agent rollout raises stakes for OpenAI's perceived moat.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: Polymarket/Cointelegraph (private company markets launch); CNBC (Google AI agents debut)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the Fed cut its policy rate below 4.5% by December 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: 30Y yields spike to 5.19% amid inflation fears and Middle East uncertainty; traders are pricing in persistent rate persistence, but recession risk may force cuts sooner than expected.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (Treasury yields highest since financial crisis; mortgage rates surge to July 2025 highs)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Anthropic's valuation exceed $100B in any financing round or secondary market by September 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Google's new AI models and agentic tools are live; Anthropic's competitive positioning is now directly testable; private market trading just enabled.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (Google AI agents debut); Polymarket (private company markets launch); Hacker News (Anthropic hiring spike score 1040)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Ethereum close above $3,500 by September 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: ETH/BTC ratio under pressure as Bitcoin dominance rises amid macro uncertainty; tokenization thesis (BoE, Ethereum Foundation roadmap) offers medium-term upside but faces near-term headwinds.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: Cointelegraph (Bitcoin price dominance); CoinDesk ('What's happening at EF?' departures signal uncertainty)

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Elon Musk's Neuralink implant a device in a human patient for blindness treatment on or before December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Neuralink official announcement or credible medical/SEC filing; Musk's public statements on timeline (flagged in 36Kr)
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Musk publicly stated intent for 2026; medical trials often slip, but market underestimates his execution velocity on high-stakes neurotechnology; positive PR for crypto/tech sector if successful.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: 36Kr reported Musk said 'plan to conduct first Neuralink implant for blindness treatment this year'; mainstream media has not yet amplified this timeline.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will SpaceX achieve a successful orbital flight test of its Starship vehicle with at least 50% booster recovery by March 31, 2027?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: SpaceX official statement, FAA payload database, or third-party tracking (e.g., NASASpaceflight); excludes uncrewed cargo-only missions.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: 36Kr flagged imminent SpaceX IPO (becoming Musk's second public company); market is pricing in binary success/failure rather than incremental engineering victories that drive valuation.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: 36Kr ('SpaceX about to become Musk's second public company') signals IPO window narrowing; successful high-profile booster recovery would be IPO-critical narrative.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Google's new AI-powered smart glasses launch before December 31, 2026, with >500K units sold or pre-ordered by that date?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Google official press release; third-party sales tracking (IDC, Counterpoint); regulatory filings if applicable.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Google announced fall 2026 launch at I/O 2026; market is not yet pricing in hardware form-factor risk or Anthropic/OpenAI competitive response in embodied AI.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC reported Google 'gave first glimpse of audio smart glasses ahead of fall launch'; no English media yet discussing sales projections or binding pre-orders.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Bitcoin's realized price drop below $65,000 at any point before June 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinMarketCap or CoinGecko daily OHLC data; intraday lows count.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Cointelegraph reported 'dip buyers waiting for lower prices' and '$70K BTC's next stop'; current price sub-$77K plus rising Treasury yields (5.19%) create macro headwind; 15% further downside is plausible in 30-60 days.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Cointelegraph data shows dip-buying thesis, but CoinDesk reports 'uniquely pessimistic traders limiting downside'—divergence suggests market is overshooting either up or down.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Polymarket's private company trading volume (OpenAI + Anthropic combined) exceed $100M cumulative notional by September 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Polymarket official dashboard or Messari/CryptoFeesIO aggregated trading data; Nasdaq official partnership announcements.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Polymarket just launched; Nasdaq partnership validation is bullish for institutional adoption; no comparable private-company prediction market has proven sustained >$100M volume, so market is pricing in 'toy' status.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Polymarket/Nasdaq partnership only announced this week; early adopter bias among crypto-native traders suggests initial volume spike, but institutional participation is unproven.

investment_theses.thesis: Long BTC/short long-duration US Treasury yields (via BTC perps + TLT short or 30Y yield calls) as inflation persistence forces Fed to hold tight despite bond market stress.
supporting_signals: 30Y Treasury yields at 5.19%, highest since before 2008 financial crisis (CNBC)
Mortgage rates surge to highest since July 2025 despite Fed pause (CNBC)
Middle East escalation (Iran tensions, insurance 'war' coverage) driving geopolitical premium in bonds
CoinDesk reports 'uniquely pessimistic traders limiting downside'—suggests capitulation floor forming
investment_theses.counter_view: Bond yields could spike further to 5.5%+ if inflation accelerates, crushing BTC risk appetite; hard asset bid (gold, oil) could outpace crypto in flight-to-safety scenarios.
investment_theses.expression: Buy BTC perps (3x leverage, 60-day hold); hedge by shorting TLT (20+ year Treasury ETF) or buying calls on 30Y Treasury yields

investment_theses.thesis: Long Ethereum (and ETH/BTC ratio long) on tokenization tailwinds (BoE remarks + Wall Street infrastructure plays) plus resolution of Ethereum Foundation uncertainty by mid-2026.
supporting_signals: BoE deputy says tokenization could cut costs and boost competition (Cointelegraph)
Former BNY exec launches NUVA bet on Wall Street tokenization remake (CoinDesk)
Ethereum Foundation departures raising uncertainty (CoinDesk), but clearing fog = positive catalyst
Google/OpenAI AI agents will demand on-chain settlement—Ethereum L1+L2 ecosystem is beneficiary
investment_theses.counter_view: Bitcoin dominance rising amid macro uncertainty (Treasury yields 5.19%); Ethereum Layer-2 fragmentation may dilute tokenization value capture; regulatory uncertainty on tokenized securities could arrest momentum.
investment_theses.expression: Long ETH spot or ETH perps (2x, 150-day hold); pair trade long ETH/short BTC on ratio basis

investment_theses.thesis: Short XRP into strength (despite 9-day ETF inflow streak) due to Ripple's binary regulatory exposure and diminished moat after PayPal tokenization narrative fades.
supporting_signals: Cointelegraph: 'XRP price risks 50% drop despite 9-day ETF inflow streak' (active debate on fundamentals)
Polymarket private company markets now live—OpenAI/Anthropic valuations will crowd out XRP narrative
CoinDesk tokenization thesis centers on BNY/Wall Street infrastructure (NUVA), not Ripple ecosystem
Senator Warren questioning OCC crypto trust charters (regulatory headwind)

investment_theses.thesis: Long NVDA (and semis sector via SMH) on AI agent capex cycle intensity signaled by Google/Anthropic/OpenAI product acceleration, offset by near-term bond yield headwinds.
supporting_signals: Google unveiled new AI models and agentic tools at I/O (CNBC); Anthropic hiring surge (HN score 1040)
Polymarket private markets launching signals $1T+ value at stake for OpenAI/Anthropic—requires massive inference infra
Hacker News discussion 'Gemini 3.5 Flash' (score 397) shows enterprise AI deployment accelerating
36Kr: Byte Dance/番茄小说 pushing AI anime to theaters—inference at scale for video
investment_theses.counter_view: Semiconductor cycle historically peaks 6-9 months after announcements; current valuations already price in AI capex; bond yield spike (5.19%) crushes growth multiples; China competition (memory/logic) rising.
investment_theses.expression: Long NVDA stock or call spreads (60-day, delta 0.6); or long SMH (semiconductor sector ETF) for broad exposure with lower concentration risk

investment_theses.thesis: Long DXY (US Dollar Index) on widening yield differential (5.19% 30Y vs. lower developed-market rates) and Middle East geopolitical premium, despite inflationary headwinds to growth.
supporting_signals: 30Y Treasury yields 5.19%, highest since financial crisis; mortgage rates surging despite Fed pause (CNBC)
Middle East escalation (Iran war risk, insurance 'war' coverage) driving safe-haven bid
Global bond markets 'on edge' monitoring central bank responses (CNBC)—higher US rates attract capital
Bitcoin under $77K suggests risk-off sentiment; BTC/DXY historically inverse
investment_theses.counter_view: Strong dollar crushes emerging market carry trades and commodity exporters, raising global recession risk; Fed may be forced to cut sooner if yield spike chokes growth; commodity inflation (oil from Iran tensions) could eventually devalue USD.
investment_theses.expression: Long DXY ETF or futures (1-2x leverage, 90-day hold); hedge via long commodity (GLD, oil futures) for inflation protection
